title: Bridge Essay: Nasal airflow promotes default mode network activity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Breath-brain coupling, pranayama, cardiorespiratory entrainment, vagal pathways of consciousness.

**Nasal airflow promotes default mode network activity.** — Respir Physiol Neurobiol. PMID: 36330894. DOI: 10.1016/j.resp.2022.103981. Default mode network (DMN) is aprincipal network that is more active at the baseline functional state of consciousness and spontaneous brain activity. Nasal breathing beyond the oxygen supply, entrained brain oscillations in widespread brain regions. Consistent with the important role of nasal breathing on neural oscillation for brain function, here we aimed to evaluate respiration entrained DMN rhythms. Using electroencephalography (EEG), we assessed the power spectral density and connectivity...
